adapters.title: XXIO Adjustable Adapter
notes: AdapterFamily is present in HeadDB, but no normalized XXIO adapter chart is included in the current Adapter Reference workbook. No alternate OEM chart is shown.
workflow: Workflow: verify generation visually before adjustment.

adapters.title: Titleist SureFit Driver/Fairway
notes: Titleist driver and fairway SureFit hosels use the same service chart for FIS purposes.
Driver/fairway SureFit adjusts loft and lie in 0.75° increments. Hybrid SureFit uses a separate 1.0° chart.
Start at A1 for right-handed heads; left-handed orientation should be verified against the OEM chart.
workflow: Workflow: confirm Titleist driver/fairway adapter → set ring letter and sleeve number → torque until wrench clicks.

adapters.title: Titleist SureFit Hybrid 910–915
notes: Legacy Titleist hybrid SureFit family for 910H/913H/915H-era hybrids.
Hybrid SureFit uses 1.0° loft/lie increments, not the 0.75° driver/fairway chart.
workflow: Workflow: confirm legacy Titleist hybrid adapter → set ring letter and sleeve number → torque until wrench clicks.

adapters.title: Titleist SureFit Hybrid 816+
notes: Modern Titleist hybrid SureFit family for 816H/818H/TS/TSi/TSR/GT-era hybrids.
Hybrid SureFit adjusts loft and lie in 1.0° increments. Do not use the driver/fairway 0.75° chart.
workflow: Workflow: confirm modern Titleist hybrid adapter → set ring letter and sleeve number → torque until wrench clicks.
